summary: Replaces the daily summaries table with per-message message_summaries table keyed on message_id

observations.text: Drops the summaries table (daily grain, channel+date keyed) and creates message_summaries (message grain, message_id keyed). This is a destructive migration — any existing daily summaries are lost.
message_id has UNIQUE constraint, enforcing one summary per message. The repository layer (message_summaries.go) uses ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE to treat Create as upsert.
Stores model name alongside summary text, enabling multi-model summarization tracking and future model-version comparisons.
